features.name: Spotlight
features.description: A dashboard widget that surfaces recently-viewed and recently-shared platform entities, giving users a fast way to resume work and discover shared content.
features.evidence_summary: The Spotlight dashboard widget (role:dashboard) is backed by the MostRecentEntities and RecentlySharedWithMe queries that supply its entity feed.

features.name: Welcome View
features.description: The home/activity dashboard view that greets users on startup, aggregating recent work and platform activity into a single landing screen.
features.evidence_summary: welcomeView outputs a view; changelog entry GROK-19524 explicitly names 'Welcome View: Activity Dashboard' and describes a startup regression fix.

features.name: Dashboard Widgets
features.description: A collection of embeddable dashboard widgets — community forum feed, web-page embed, custom HTML, and KPI metric display — for composing informational home screens.
features.evidence_summary: All four functions share role:widget / role:dashboard and produce widget outputs for dashboard composition; the forum doc is linked via the Community widget.

features.name: Power Search
features.description: A platform-wide search provider with AI-powered query interpretation and entity similarity search, accessible via the global search bar.
features.evidence_summary: The role:searchProvider function is explicitly named 'Power Search' in changelog entries that describe AI query support and entity similarity search additions.

features.name: Formula Lines
features.description: Adds formula-driven reference lines and bands to viewers, with a visual editor for defining, validating, and editing formula expressions directly from viewer context menus.
features.evidence_summary: Formula, formulaLinesEditor, and isFormulaColumn share the 'formula' name root; five changelog entries and two dedicated help docs explicitly describe Formula Lines validation, editing, and filter support.

features.name: Add New Column
features.description: An interactive dialog for appending a computed column to a dataframe by authoring a formula expression, with auto-complete, type checking, and validation.
features.evidence_summary: addNewColumn (input: funccall) is the core function; six changelog entries across multiple versions all reference 'Add new column dialog' by name for formula, validation, and type fixes.

features.name: Data Enrichment
features.description: Augments dataframe columns with external data by matching on a key column, supporting catalog browsing, data sync, and cross-connection lookups.
features.evidence_summary: runEnrichment (role:transform, multi-parameter including dataframe and connection strings) is the sole dedicated function; v1.8.0 opens with an 'Enrichments:' section covering data sync and catalog support.

features.name: File Viewers
features.description: In-platform rendering of Markdown (.md / .mdx) files and Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheets without leaving the Datagrok UI.
features.evidence_summary: Both functions carry role:fileViewer / role:fileHandler and together cover the two most common non-tabular file formats users encounter.

features.name: Viewer Gallery
features.description: A browsable gallery for discovering and adding viewers to a table view, automatically filtering out specialty viewers incompatible with the active dataset.
features.evidence_summary: viewerDialog and viewerGallery share the 'Viewer Gallery' name root; GROK-19533 and GROK-19005 explicitly name the Viewers Gallery in bug-fix entries.

features.name: Cron Input
features.description: A value-editor widget for cron-syntax scheduling expressions, used when configuring timed jobs and automations in the platform.
features.evidence_summary: cronInput carries role:valueEditor and semType:cron; the changelog entry explicitly introduces 'Cron Input: Introduced new cron schedule input widget'.

features.name: Compare Columns
features.description: A utility that compares two or more dataframe columns side-by-side to highlight differences and statistical similarities.
features.evidence_summary: compareColumns is a standalone function whose name unambiguously signals column comparison; no tags or changelog entries provide additional signals.

features.name: Windows Manager
features.description: An autostart service that manages platform window layout, docking, and lifecycle so user sessions resume in a consistent spatial arrangement.
features.evidence_summary: windowsManager has role:autostart and description 'Windows Manager', indicating persistent window-management behavior registered at startup.
